🔒Parent Hub
.player-card{cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;overflow:hidden;} .player-card:hover{border-color:var(--teal);transform:translateY(-2px);} .player-thumb{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:8px;object-fit:cover;border:1.5px solid var(--teal);flex-shrink:0;} .player-thumb-placeholder{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--teal-glow);border:1.5px solid var(--teal);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:20px;color:var(--teal);flex-shrink:0;} .spotlight-overlay{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85);z-index:200;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:16px;overflow-y:auto;} .spotlight-overlay.hidden{display:none;} .spotlight-modal{background:#0e1620;border:1px solid rgba(0,169,206,0.3);border-radius:16px;width:100%;max-width:360px;overflow:hidden;animation:popIn 0.25s ease;position:relative;} @keyframes popIn{from{transform:scale(0.88);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}} .spotlight-action-wrap{position:relative;} .spotlight-action{width:100%;height:220px;object-fit:cover;display:block;} .spotlight-close{position:absolute;top:12px;right:12px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);border:1.5px solid white;border-radius:50%;color:white;font-size:14px;width:32px;height:32px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:10;} .spotlight-number-overlay{position:absolute;bottom:12px;left:14px;font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:56px;color:white;line-height:1;letter-spacing:2px;text-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);} .spotlight-profile-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:16px 16px 0;} .spotlight-profile-pic{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;border:3px solid #00A9CE;object-fit:cover;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:-32px;background:#0e1620;} .spotlight-profile-pic-placeholder{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;border:3px solid #00A9CE;background:#161b21;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:24px;color:#00A9CE;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:-32px;} .spotlight-name{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:white;line-height:1;margin-top:4px;} .spotlight-pos-badge{display:inline-block;background:#00A9CE;color:#101820;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;margin-top:4px;text-transform:uppercase;} .spotlight-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);} .stat-item{text-align:center;background:#161b21;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 4px;} .stat-item .sv{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:18px;color:#00A9CE;line-height:1;} .stat-item .sl{font-size:9px;color:#8C8279;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;} .spotlight-bio-section{padding:14px 16px 20px;} .spotlight-bio-label{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;color:#00A9CE;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;} .spotlight-bio-text{font-size:13px;color:#ccd6e0;line-height:1.7;} .spotlight-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:12px;} .spotlight-tag{background:rgba(0,169,206,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(0,169,206,0.2);color:#00A9CE;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:4px;} Seckinger Jaguars
